overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a rainy night in a historic French Quarter-inspired city (Saint Denis). The character navigates from a narrow alley through courtyards and cobblestone streets illuminated by warm gas lamps, with consistent rainfall and wet reflective surfaces throughout.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow brick alleyway between buildings with multiple wooden doors

entered.detail: tall weathered brick wall with multiple windows above
row of dark wooden storage doors with metal frames
warm yellow gas lantern mounted on wall
stacked wooden chairs against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed alleyway between brick buildings at night. The area is sheltered from rain with warm wall-mounted lanterns illuminating wooden storage doors and scattered debris on the cobblestone ground.

events.description: exits narrow alley into open courtyard with outdoor furniture

agents.ego_description: walking through doorway into a small courtyard with outdoor tables and chairs

entered.detail: wooden table with chairs arranged for outdoor dining
large potted plant with red foliage
lit candle lantern on ground providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the alley into a small open courtyard with outdoor seating furniture and potted plants. The space transitions from enclosed to open with mixed lighting from candles and ambient sources, revealing a doorway leading to the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with tram tracks

events.description: exits courtyard onto main cobblestone street with gas lighting
streetcar passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet cobblestone street, passing under gas lamps and alongside historic buildings

notable_agents.action: streetcar moving along tracks in the same direction as the character

entered.detail: wet reflective cobblestone road surface with puddles
cast iron gas lamp post with warm yellow glow
historic two-story brick building with arched windows
decorative wrought iron balcony on second floor
metal tram tracks embedded in the cobblestone street

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a wide cobblestone street lined with historic two-story brick buildings featuring wrought iron balconies. Gas lamps cast warm light on the wet ground as rain continues to fall. A streetcar passes by on the left while the character walks along the tram tracks.

events.description: moves under covered sidewalk gallery with overhead roof

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered sidewalk past storefronts with green shutters

entered.detail: overhead wooden roof structure providing shelter from rain
painted green wooden shutters on storefront windows
wooden bench sitting against the storefront wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks under a covered sidewalk gallery that provides shelter from the rain. The area features storefronts with distinctive green wooden shutters and wooden benches, with the cobblestone street visible to the left.

events.description: exits covered walkway back into open street at corner intersection

agents.ego_description: turning left at the street corner and continuing down the cobblestone road past a saloon

entered.detail: corner building with curved facade and multiple windows
illuminated saloon sign with decorative lettering
wooden wagon cart parked on the side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway and turns left at a street corner, passing a building with a prominent saloon sign. The open cobblestone street continues with tram tracks visible, lined with historic buildings and illuminated by gas lamps in the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered, narrow alleyway into the open, rain-slicked streets of a historic city at night. It begins within a confined brick corridor where warm wall-mounted lanterns illuminate wooden doors and debris on the cobblestones. As the character moves forward, the space opens into a small courtyard filled with potted plants and outdoor furniture, shifting the lighting from focused lanterns to a softer ambient glow. The scene then expands further as the character steps out from the courtyard onto a wide cobblestone street lined with wrought iron balconies and glowing gas lamps. Finally, the camera tracks along tram rails through the falling rain as a streetcar passes by, completing the journey from the secluded alley to the bustling urban thoroughfare.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered confines of a covered sidewalk into the open, rain-slicked streets of a historic city. It begins beneath a gallery walkway, passing storefronts with green wooden shutters and wooden benches while the cobblestone street remains visible to the left. As the character moves forward, the camera exits the shelter and turns left at a street corner, passing a prominent saloon sign. The scene then opens onto a wide cobblestone thoroughfare where tram tracks glisten under the glow of gas lamps in the rainy night.
